creator: noah.bergbauer@tum.de
text: As of https://reviews.freebsd.org/D27230, sysutils/uefi-edk2-bhyve-csm now has a runtime dependency on gcc48 through "USE_GCC=4.8" when before it inherited the "USE_GCC=4.8:build" from sysutils/uefi-edk2-bhyve (i.e. a build dependency only). Given that the package builds just a floppy image, I think that adding this runtime dependency was unintentional.
